title: Answered Extempore By Dr. Swift
content:
We both are mortal; but thou, frailer creature,
        May'st die, like me, by chance, but not by nature.
meaning:
Jonathan Swift's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Answered Extempore By Dr. Swift"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
